name: Turkey Patties Oriental
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ground turkey with tomatoes, bread crumbs, egg, and Oriental Sauce.
2. Form the mixture into 4-6 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Saute burgers for 3 minutes on each side until browned.
5. Pour the remaining Oriental Sauce over the burgers and bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
6. Reduce heat and add celery, onion, and pepper. Simmer covered for 6 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Add tomatoes and simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes until meat is no longer pink.
